title: callirhoe involucrata var. involucrata
intro: Callirhoe involucrata var. involucrata, also known as Purple Poppy Mallow, is a flowering plant in the mallow family that is native to the United States and Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can be attributed to its high concentration of saponins and flavonoids. The health benefits of Callirhoe involucrata var. involucrata include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
